creator: yuripv@yuripv.dev
text: How exactly did you upgrade?  There's nothing in source upgrade path that assumes ZFS installation and creates the ones you mentioned.  OTOH, ZFS installation type in installer DOES create those, so is it possible that those were created when you installed the system and (really just guessing) set their mountpoints to "legacy" forgetting about it?  In any case, I have /home as separate dataset -- explicitly deleted the symlink and did destroy /usr/home -- and during 12.2-BETA1 -> 13-CURRENT upgrade yesterday nothing was re-created for me.
